name: get_isochrones
description: Calculate reachable areas (isochrones) from one or more locations within a given time or distance limit. Returns GeoJSON polygons representing the areas you can reach. Useful for answering questions like 'What can I reach within 15 minutes by car?' or 'Show me areas within a 5km walking radius.' Supports the same transport profiles as the directions endpoint.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: The transport mode. Path parameter. Options: driving-car, driving-hgv, cycling-regular, cycling-mountain, cycling-electric, foot-walking, foot-hiking, wheelchair.

parameters.name: locations
parameters.description: Array of [longitude, latitude] coordinate pairs as center points for isochrone calculation.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Array of range values in seconds (for time) or meters (for distance). Example: [300, 600] for 5 and 10 minute isochrones.

parameters.name: range_type
parameters.description: Type of range values. Options: time (seconds, default), distance (meters).

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Interval to split the range into sub-isochrones. For example, range=[600] with interval=300 gives two isochrones at 5 and 10 minutes.
